classification.reason: The customer is inquiring about the refund policy, which is a general billing inquiry.

email.subject: Refund Policy Inquiry
email.body: Dear Customer, thank you for reaching out. Unfortunately, I don't have any information on your current order status. Our refund policy can be found in our Knowledge Base, but I'd be happy to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. Please let me know how I can further assist you.
